creator: val@packett.cool
text:
We hit the same llvm package thing with wasi-libc, we ended up providing the llvm stdarg.h (and stddef.h) in files/ too:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/tree/46e348be07c024d1bd25f1e0a965ce13cd4aaf35/devel/wasi-libc/files

IIRC there was an actual reason for llvm ports to exclude these headers.
